blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for emergency override functionality
Provide concrete evidence or API endpoints that demonstrate the emergency override capability.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'Emergency override (manager can force assignment)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or any related endpoints, it is clear that there is a gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of any evidence supporting the emergency override functionality leads to the conclusion that this requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of an emergency override feature allowing managers to force assignment.
